l Z!e
Pool manager manage all aspects of a pool's lifecycle. Using
Python libvirt to perform all the required task for configuring
the pool.
In general other component should be using the manager to make
changes to the pool.
deque)

z"PoolManager.lifecycle_event_handlec
Handles events coming in from libvirtd and source device.
        This thread which waits for events to arrive from the
        libvirt event loop thread or netlink, then dispatches the
        events to a pool.

PoolManager._handle_event_startc
Puts an libvirt event on the queue for handling.
        This method is called by the event loop thread
        to put events on the queue for later handling
        by the handle thread.
